description: Claudish unified proxy — Opus via Anthropic, Sonnet via z.ai, Haiku via vLLM
notes: Pass-through proxy: each client machine provides its own auth (no proxy key)
Opus routes to Anthropic with pass-through headers (Max subscription OAuth)
Sonnet routes to z.ai via GLM_CODING_API_KEY or ZAI_API_KEY from config
Haiku routes to vLLM Qwen3.6-35b-a3b via custom endpoint from config
The billing header `x-anthropic-billing-header` is stripped from prompts for non-Anthropic providers to preserve vLLM KV cache
/v1/models endpoint returns all routable models from config routing rules
Switch-Provider script preserves `model` field — keep it set to `opus` by default
